use_rules: Keep raw data under ignored research/datasets/ folders.
Keep derived embeddings, reports, and model artifacts under ignored research/artifacts/ folders.
Do not use any dataset to claim EarlyCare diagnoses Parkinson's disease, concussion, TBI, stroke, depression, or any other condition.
Treat validated model release as blocked until model-card gates are manually reviewed.

datasets.name: NeuroVoz
datasets.participants: 108 speakers described by the project: 53 Parkinsonian, 55 controls; 2,903 audio files
datasets.earlycare_use: First raw-audio Parkinson's watch benchmark after access and license are confirmed.
required_before_training: Confirm dataset access approval.
Record license and redistribution restrictions.
Download locally under research/datasets/NeuroVoz.
Prepare and manually review the manifest before extraction.

datasets.name: UCI Parkinson's Speech with Multiple Types of Sound Recordings
datasets.labels: Parkinson's disease vs healthy control; UPDRS for Parkinson's participants
datasets.participants: 20 Parkinson's participants and 20 healthy controls in training data; additional sustained-vowel Parkinson's test set
datasets.earlycare_use: Feature-table sanity check for speaker-level PD/control experiments; not raw-audio embedding validation.
required_before_training: Fetch with research/speech_ml/fetch_public_datasets.py.
Confirm the fetch manifest has a classification_ready table.
Keep reports labelled feature-only.

datasets.name: UCI Parkinsons Telemonitoring
datasets.labels: Motor UPDRS and total UPDRS for early-stage Parkinson's participants
tasks: home voice recordings represented as biomedical voice measures
datasets.earlycare_use: Longitudinal UPDRS trend and feature-association research only; not PD/control classifier training.
required_before_training: Fetch with research/speech_ml/fetch_public_datasets.py.
Confirm the fetch manifest has a progression_ready table.
Use analyze_progression_table.py, not run_experiment.py.

datasets.name: mPower
datasets.labels: Self-reported Parkinson's/control, surveys, and mobile active-task metadata
datasets.earlycare_use: Scale candidate after Synapse data-use review; useful for sustained-vowel validation, not immediate hackathon training.
required_before_training: Complete Synapse access and data-use statement.
Confirm whether voice files are available under approved access.
Map file IDs to participant metadata without committing subject exports.

datasets.name: PC-GITA
datasets.labels: Parkinson's disease vs matched healthy controls
datasets.earlycare_use: Secondary benchmark for cross-dataset Parkinson's watch validation after access is approved.
required_before_training: Confirm access and license.
Use only after NeuroVoz-style raw-audio pipeline is working.
Report cross-dataset performance separately.

datasets.name: Bridge2AI Voice
datasets.labels: Voice disorders, neurological disorders, mood disorders, respiratory disorders, and clinical metadata depending on release tier
datasets.participants: PhysioNet v3.1 describes 833 participants in the low-risk public release
datasets.earlycare_use: Future broad voice-health validation source; not a quick Parkinson's/concussion training set for this app.
required_before_training: Confirm exact release tier and raw-audio access.
Review PhysioNet credentialing and data-use terms.
Avoid mixing disease domains without subgroup reporting.

datasets.name: TBIBank / Coelho Corpus
datasets.labels: Closed head injury vs non-brain-injured controls for selected corpora
datasets.language: English for Coelho corpus; other TalkBank corpora vary
datasets.participants: Coelho corpus describes 55 closed-head-injury speakers and 52 controls
datasets.earlycare_use: Future discourse/language research only; not acute concussion detection.
required_before_training: Join the relevant TalkBank/TBIBank access group.
Confirm corpus-specific terms.
Do not use as an acute concussion speech detector.

datasets.name: Concussion speech pilot studies
datasets.labels: Concussed participants, healthy controls, and neurodegenerative comparison groups in reported studies
datasets.participants: Published pilot reports include concussed and control speech samples, but public app-ready raw-audio access is not established here
datasets.earlycare_use: Evidence framing only. Keep concussion escalation symptom-led until an approved acute concussion speech dataset is available.
required_before_training: Find a public or approved acute concussion speech dataset.
Confirm consent, labels, recording timing, and license.
Validate against clinical danger signs and avoid standalone diagnosis claims.
